onboarding.desc1: Help protect the environment by recycling easily in a smart way.
onboarding.desc2: Use the map to locate nearby recycling centers and deliver your waste easily.
onboarding.desc3: Record your recycling activities and earn points to redeem for eco-friendly rewards.

login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue and contribute to a better environment

signup.title: Sign Up
signup.subtitle: Create your account and start your journey toward a cleaner environment

verification_message: Check you Spam messages in you gmail to verify your email
